title: vitis vitiensis
intro: Vitis vitiensis, also known as the Fijian grape vine, is a plant native to the Pacific Islands. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestion. Vitis vitiensis can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and is also sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
